patch.value: body-preview silently empty for real pm items: body not loaded (GH #27)

Items load via list-all --json / listAllFrontMatter which omit body. Fix: --include-body on CLI list-all; locateItem+readLocatedItem enrichment in extension when bodyPreview set. pm-cli PR #108 review.

value.author: codex
value.text: Fixed: CLI readPmItems adds --include-body to 'pm list-all --json' when bodyPreview>0 (verified --include-body populates body field in 2026.5.31+). Extension enrichItemBodies() re-reads bodies via public SDK locateItem+readLocatedItem (best-effort, per-item failure swallowed) when bodyPreview set. Unit test: fake pm bin returns body only with --include-body. Functionally verified both npx CLI and 'pm changelog generate --body-preview' render real body, fall back to description, no fork-bomb.
